title: Opinion: Opinion | How Iran Has Pierced The One 'Shield' That Protected America For 30 Years
summary_full: The downing of the American F-15E and two A-10 Thunderbolt II lay bare the vulnerability of non-stealth, low-altitude platforms operating in contested environments.
summary_public: The downing of the American F-15E and two A-10 Thunderbolt II lay bare the vulnerability of non-stealth, low-altitude platforms operating in contested environments.
